title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Go First Cargo

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Go First Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Fleet Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!
